subject: Mathematics
title: Infinitely Many Infinite Buses
description: A 60-second lesson on Infinitely Many Infinite Buses.

hook.text: Now infinitely many buses arrive, each carrying infinitely many passengers. Can the hotel cope?

buildup.text: Assign each person a pair: (bus number, seat number). We need to fit all pairs into single rooms.

discovery.text: Use a diagonal zigzag to list all pairs: (1,1), (1,2), (2,1), (1,3), (2,2), (3,1), and so on.

twist.text: This proves that the set of all integer pairs is countable—the same size as the natural numbers.

climax.text: Cantor used this pairing trick to show the rational numbers are countable too.

punchline.text: Infinity times infinity is still the same infinity.

quiz.question: What technique assigns infinitely many bus passengers to rooms?
